description_long: This is a modern, open-frame shelving unit constructed from light-colored wood with a natural grain pattern. The design features a series of staggered rectangular shelves, creating a visually interesting, asymmetrical arrangement with multiple open compartments of varying heights and widths. The vertical supports are thick and robust, providing stability and a bold geometric outline. There are no doors, drawers, or enclosed sections, making all storage spaces fully accessible from the front and sides. The back and sides are open, allowing for visibility and airflow through the structure. This type of shelving is suitable for displaying books, decorative items, or plants in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or outdoor patios.
description: A light wood, open-frame shelving unit with staggered, asymmetrical shelves and a modern geometric design. All compartments are open and accessible, with no doors or enclosed sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staggered, open shelves and the full depth of the compartments.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid vertical support and the thickness of the wood panels, with shelves mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, revealing the open compartments and shelf arrangement from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other solid vertical support and the wood grain pattern.
